name: Cornbread Stuffing, 1986
recipeInstructions:
YIELDS 9 CUPS OR ENOUGH FOR A 12 LB TURKEY (22 LB 1986)
1. Place reserved giblets in a saucepan with 2 cups of water; cover and simmer 1-2 hours or until giblets are tender. Remove from broth, reserving 1 cup.
2. Chop giblets; set aside.
3. Combine cornbread and bread cubes in a large mixing bowl; add 1/4 cup water, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
4. Melt butter in a large skillet; add sausage, celery, and onion. Saute for 3 minutes.
5. Cover and cook an additional 30 minutes or until sausage is browned and vegetables are tender, stirring frequently.
6. Remove from heat; stir in bread mixture.
7. Add reserved giblet broth and giblets, mixing well.
Yield: 9 cups or enough for a 12 lb turkey. Thanksgiving 1986.
